name: MORRIS'S
subtitle: Specialty Coffee
tagline: A small Mayfair bar dedicated to the craft of coffee — single origins, precise extractions, and a quiet room away from the crowd.
registeredAddress: 15B Clifford Street, London W1S 4JZ, United Kingdom

menuItems.name: Ethiopia Yirgacheffe
menuItems.desc: Washed process, delicate and floral with a clean citrus finish.

menuItems.name: Colombia El Paraiso
menuItems.desc: Balanced and sweet, a dependable everyday espresso.

menuItems.name: Brazil Cerrado
menuItems.desc: Low acidity, full body — built for flat whites.

menuItems.name: Sumatra Mandheling
menuItems.desc: Earthy and syrupy, our winter house blend.

roasteryDescription: Beans are roasted weekly in small batches and rested 48 hours before the first pull. No blends disguised as single origins — just honest coffee.
orderSubtitle: Skip the queue on Clifford Street.
footerTagline: Specialty coffee in the heart of Mayfair. Small batches, no shortcuts.
